title: Mindmapping as a standard feature included in monday
excerpt: It would be great if monday would include a mindmapping option for a board. Its availible in the app market, but its a feature which I would definitely expect to be part of monday. At least a simple mind mapping function…

posts.author: TJP (Thilo Pukall)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if monday would include a mindmapping option for a board. Its availible in the app market, but its a feature which I would definitely expect to be part of monday. At least a simple mind mapping function. the app in the market is 48$ per user, which adds up too much costs in combination with monday.
Please create a simple mindmapping tool as a standard feature
